use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive navigation triggers with icon support for visual clarity
Premium-featured buttons in SaaS dashboards and product interfaces
Action buttons requiring visual hierarchy in dark-themed applications
ai_summary: A decorative gradient button component featuring glass-morphism effects with backdrop blur, animated moving gradient overlays on hover, and smooth scale/glow transitions. Supports customizable light/dark gradients, three size variants (sm/md/lg), and includes Lucide icon integration with title/subtitle content slots. The button includes sophisticated hover states with opacity transitions and shadow effects, making it suitable for premium SaaS and modern web application interfaces.
